Savoury latte • Gut & collagen • Postpartum recovery

Meat Stock Latte

Warm, frothed bone stock with ghee and salt — a savoury, collagen-rich cup that comforts the gut.
Makes 1 mug
Time 5 min
Caffeine none
For you · a warm savoury cup
When to drink Any time — a warming morning or afternoon cup. Especially grounding on cold or low-energy days.

Why this heals you

  • Meat stock — gelatin & collagen to support the gut lining tradition
  • Ghee — warming fat; fat-soluble vitamins tradition
  • Sea salt — replaces minerals; makes it satisfying tradition
  • Savoury & caffeine-free — a change from sweet drinks tradition
Ingredients
1 cupMeat stock (well-gelled)
1 tspGhee
pinchSea salt
1 tbspBeef gelatin (optional)
Method
1
Warm the stock

Gently heat 1 cup of your meat stock until steaming.

2
Blend to froth

Blend (or whisk hard) with 1 tsp ghee and a pinch of salt until frothy.

3
Pour & sip

Pour into a mug. Sip warm, like a savoury latte.

Just for you, Mum

The most nourishing ‘coffee replacement’ there is — warm, savoury and rich in the gelatin that helps a healing body knit back together. Make stock in batches from your chicken feet & necks.

Good to know
BestMorning or afternoon, warm.
BoostWhisk in 1 tbsp beef gelatin for extra collagen.
Why we say this
Stock’s gelatin/collagen and traditional gut-soothing use are honestly labelled tradition; not a medical claim.

Food, not medical advice · non-diagnostic · made for this season of motherhood
